blocks.scaleText: At JoinBits, we build secure, scalable software systems designed for long term growth. Our engineers combine modern architecture, automation, and clean code principles to deliver reliable solutions.
blocks.limitsText: Whether you need a dedicated engineering team or a full product built from scratch, we integrate seamlessly with your organization to accelerate innovation and execution.

faq.descriptioncontact: At JoinBits Technologies, we partner with companies to design and build modern software systems that are scalable, secure, and built for the future. From custom development to AI automation, we turn complex ideas into production ready solutions.

consultingPageMain.heroTitle: Engineering consulting & staffing for .NET (C#), Java, and DevOps teams.
consultingPageMain.heroDescription: JoinBits provides vetted engineers and hands on technical leadership to help you deliver faster API development, modern backends, cloud integration, and system modernization.
consultingPageMain.ctaDescription: Need support with .NET, Java or Devops?  Contact us for a free discovery call and we’ll recommend the best engagement model staff augmentation, project delivery, or a dedicated squad.
consultingPageMain.jumpstartDescription: Accelerate delivery with senior engineers who can onboard fast, work inside your process, and ship production ready code. From microservices to integrations, we focus on measurable outcomes.
consultingPageMain.missionTitle: Our mission is to simplify hiring top software engineering talent.
consultingPageMain.missionDescription: At JoinBits, we connect companies with engineers specialized in .NET (C#) and Java for modern platforms. We build robust APIs, scalable microservices architectures, and enterprise grade backend solutions aligned with industry best practices. We manage cloud deployments, automate processes through CI/CD, and implement DevOps practices to ensure operational efficiency and stability. From legacy system modernization to the design of new cloud native architectures, we focus on measurable outcomes, clear communication, and long term strategic collaboration.

items.title: .NET (C#) Enterprise Development
items.text: Scalable APIs, microservices, and enterprise grade backend systems built with modern .NET (C#) and best practices.

items.title: Staff Augmentation & Dedicated Teams

intro.p1: At JoinBits, we provide senior engineers in .NET (C#), Java, Cloud, and DevOps who seamlessly integrate into your existing teams. Our professionals bring architectural vision, development best practices, and experience across enterprise environments.

c1.title: .NET (C#) Engineers
c1.text: .NET developers experienced in APIs, microservices, enterprise systems, and scalable backend platforms built with modern architectures.

c2.title: Java Engineers
c2.text: Senior Java engineers with expertise in Spring Boot, distributed systems, high performance services, and enterprise integrations.

c3.title: Cloud Engineers
c3.text: Azure and AWS specialists focused on infrastructure as code, scalable deployments, and secure cloud native architectures.

privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how JoinBits Technologies (“JoinBits,” “we,” “us,” or “our”) collects, uses, discloses, and protects your information when you visit our website, contact us, or use our services. By using our website or services, you agree to the practices described in this policy.

s1.title: 1. Information We Collect
s1.intro: We may collect the following types of information:

items.i1: Contact information: name, email address, phone number, company name, job title, and information submitted through forms or inquiries.
items.i2: Service related information: project details, requirements, and communications shared during discovery, delivery, or support.
items.i3: Usage data: device type, browser type, pages visited, referral URLs, IP address, and interaction data (via cookies/analytics where enabled).

items.i1: Respond to inquiries and provide customer support.
items.i2: Deliver services, proposals, statements of work, and project communications.
items.i3: Improve website performance and user experience.
items.i4: Send updates, administrative messages, and marketing communications (where permitted).
items.i5: Protect against fraud and security incidents.

s3.title: 3. Cookies and Analytics
s3.text: We use cookies and similar technologies to operate our website and analyze traffic patterns. You may control cookies through your browser settings.

s4.title: 4. How We Share Information
s4.intro: We do not sell personal information. We may share data in limited cases:

items.i1: Service providers supporting hosting, analytics, communications, and delivery.
items.i2: Legal compliance when required by law or to protect rights and safety.
items.i3: Business transfers in the event of a merger or acquisition.

s5.title: 5. Data Security
s5.text: We implement reasonable administrative and technical safeguards. However, no method of transmission is 100% secure.

s6.title: 6. Data Retention
s6.text: We retain personal information only as long as necessary for the purposes outlined in this policy.

s7.title: 7. Your Rights and Choices
s7.text: Depending on your location, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, or restrict processing of your personal data.

s8.title: 8. Third Party Links
s8.text: We are not responsible for the privacy practices of third party websites.

s9.title: 9. International Data Transfers
s9.text: Your information may be processed in the United States or other jurisdictions where our providers operate.

s10.title: 10. Changes to This Policy
s10.text: We may update this policy periodically. Continued use of the website constitutes acceptance of updates.

s11.title: 11. Contact Us
s11.text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us at:

cta.text: Have questions about privacy or need a custom NDA/SOW for your project? Reach out and we’ll help.

terms.intro: These Terms and Conditions (“Terms”) govern your access to and use of the website and services provided by JoinBits Technologies (“JoinBits,” “we,” “us,” or “our”). By accessing this website or engaging our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

s1.title: 1. Use of Website
s1.text: You agree to use this website only for lawful purposes. You may not use the website in any manner that could damage, disable, overburden, or impair our systems or interfere with any other user’s access.

s2.title: 2. Services
s2.text: JoinBits provides software engineering, AI & automation solutions, cloud architecture, industrial automation integration, staffing, and consulting services. Specific deliverables, timelines, scope, and pricing are defined in separate agreements, proposals, or Statements of Work (SOW).

s3.title: 3. Intellectual Property
items: JoinBits retains ownership of all pre existing intellectual property, frameworks, tools, and methodologies.
Custom developed deliverables are governed by the applicable client agreement.
Website content, branding, logos, and materials are owned by JoinBits and may not be reproduced without written permission.

s4.title: 4. Payments and Billing
s4.text: Payment terms are defined in signed agreements or invoices. Failure to make timely payment may result in suspension or termination of services. Fees are non refundable unless otherwise specified in writing.

s5.title: 5. Confidentiality
s5.text: Both parties agree to maintain confidentiality of proprietary or sensitive information shared during engagements. Additional obligations may be defined in a Non Disclosure Agreement (NDA).

s6.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
s6.text: To the fullest extent permitted by law, JoinBits shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, consequential, special, or punitive damages, including loss of profits, business interruption, or data loss arising from use of our services or website.

s7.title: 7. Disclaimer of Warranties
s7.text: Services and website content are provided “as is” without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We do not guarantee uninterrupted, secure, or error free operation.

s8.title: 8. Third Party Services
s8.text: Our services may rely on third party platforms, APIs, hosting providers, or integrations. JoinBits is not responsible for failures or changes caused by third party services.

s9.title: 9. Termination
s9.text: We reserve the right to terminate or suspend services for breach of these Terms or applicable agreements. Project termination terms are governed by the relevant contract or SOW.

s10.title: 10. Governing Law
s10.text: These Terms shall be governed by the laws of the State of Florida, United States, without regard to conflict of law principles.

s11.title: 11. Changes to Terms
s11.text: We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of our website or services after updates are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

s12.title: 12. Contact Information
s12.text: If you have questions about these Terms and Conditions, contact us:

cta.text: Have questions about our legal terms or need a custom contract for your project? Contact our team.

items.question: What services does JoinBits offer?
items.answer: We provide senior .NET (C#), Java, Cloud, and DevOps engineers through staffing, staff augmentation, and dedicated teams—helping you scale delivery fast without sacrificing quality.

items.question: Do you offer dedicated teams or individual engineers?
items.answer: Both. You can hire a single engineer to fill a gap, or we can assemble a dedicated squad with a lead and the right mix of backend, cloud, and DevOps expertise.

items.question: How quickly can we onboard engineers?
items.answer: Typically within days—not months. We align on requirements, confirm availability, and integrate into your tools and workflow (Jira, GitHub/Azure DevOps, Slack, etc.).

items.question: What industries do you work with?
items.answer: We support a wide range of industries including SaaS, fintech, logistics, e-commerce, and enterprise operations—anywhere scalable backend and cloud delivery is critical.

items.question: How do you ensure engineering quality?
items.answer: Our engineers follow clean architecture, strong code review practices, testing standards, and DevOps discipline. We also communicate clearly and report progress consistently.

faqPage.ctaText: Looking to scale your engineering team with senior talent? Let’s discuss your needs and match you with the right .NET, Java, Cloud, or DevOps engineers.

items.question: 01. What does JoinBits specialize in?
items.answer: JoinBits provides custom software engineering, AI driven automation, cloud architecture, and industrial technology solutions. We help companies modernize systems, improve performance, and scale efficiently.

items.question: 02. Do you offer engineering staffing?
items.answer: Yes. We provide contract engineers, staff augmentation, and dedicated teams that integrate seamlessly with your organization. Our talent covers software development, DevOps, AI, and automation engineering.

items.question: 03. Can you handle full project delivery?
items.answer: Absolutely. We manage projects end to end from architecture and development to deployment and scaling—ensuring secure, scalable, and production ready solutions.

items.question: 04. How quickly can you start?
items.answer: For staffing engagements, we can deploy qualified engineers quickly based on your requirements. For full projects, timelines depend on scope, but our process is designed for speed without compromising quality.

aiCloud.quote: Speed matters, but reliability matters more. We design systems that stay fast when reality hits.
aiCloud.author: JoinBits Engineering
aiCloud.p1: We help teams modernize their stack with cloud native architecture, secure APIs, and data pipelines that scale without surprises.
aiCloud.p2: From AWS/Azure foundations to AI integrations, we focus on clean design, measurable outcomes, and production grade operations.

automation.quote: Automation isn’t about replacing people, it’s about removing friction so teams can move faster.
automation.author: JoinBits Automation
automation.p1: We build and maintain automation for industrial and business workflows: PLC/SCADA integrations, monitoring, and event driven systems.
automation.p2: Our approach prioritizes uptime, traceability, and safe deployments especially in environments where downtime is expensive.

software.quote: Simple is hard. We make it simple by doing the hard engineering work upfront.
software.author: JoinBits Software
software.p1: We deliver custom web apps, internal tools, and integrations that reduce manual work and improve visibility across teams.
software.p2: Clean code, strong logging, and pragmatic testing so your system is easier to change next month than it is today.

staffing.quote: The right engineer doesn’t just write code, they reduce risk and increase momentum.
staffing.author: JoinBits Talent
staffing.p1: We provide senior technical talent across software, cloud, and automation to augment your team or lead delivery end to end.
staffing.p2: We care about communication and ownership, you get engineers who think like partners, not ticket closers.

delivery.quote: Great delivery is boring: clear plans, predictable releases, and systems you can trust.
delivery.author: JoinBits Delivery
delivery.p1: We align scope, timelines, and success metrics before we build then ship iteratively with visibility and accountability.
delivery.p2: After launch, we support monitoring, incident response, and continuous improvement so your product keeps getting better.

hero.title: Custom Software Development
hero.subtitle: Build software tailored to your operations secure, scalable, and engineered for real world performance. From MVPs to enterprise platforms, we ship production ready web apps, mobile apps, APIs, and integrations.

intro.title: Software built around your business
intro.lead: If your business is running on spreadsheets, disconnected tools, or slow legacy systems, we can help you modernize. JoinBits builds custom software that removes friction and unlocks operational scale.
intro.body: We design systems with clean architecture, strong security, and long term maintainability. Our team delivers full stack applications, internal platforms, dashboards, workflow automation, integrations, and modern APIs with transparent communication and reliable delivery.

process.title: How we work
process.subtitle: A structured process that minimizes risk, aligns stakeholders, and ships value fast without sacrificing quality.

split.title: Production ready
split.body: We don’t just “code it.” We build software with testing, security, observability, and documentation so your product remains stable and easy to evolve.

skills.title: Our core expertise
skills.body: Our team delivers full stack engineering across modern web architectures, cloud native platforms, API ecosystems, and enterprise integrations. We design systems with scalability, security, and long term maintainability in mind applying production grade DevOps practices, automated testing, performance optimization, and clean architecture principles at every layer. From backend services and data pipelines to frontend experiences and deployment automation, we build software that performs reliably under real business demands.

cta.text: Ready to build custom software that scales with your business? Let’s talk about your goals and architecture.

assessment.title: Cloud Readiness & Architecture Review
assessment.f2: Security posture review and risk analysis
assessment.f3: Cost estimation and cloud sizing guidance

hero.title: Cloud Integration & Architecture
hero.description: Modernize your infrastructure with secure, scalable, and cloud native integrations. We connect systems, migrate workloads, and design resilient cloud environments for long term growth.

mission.title: Our Cloud Mission
mission.description: At JoinBits, we drive strategic cloud transformation initiatives designed to modernize enterprise technology landscapes. We help organizations evolve from fragmented legacy environments and on premise infrastructure into secure, scalable, and fully integrated cloud ecosystems. Our mission is to architect resilient, cloud native solutions that enhance performance, strengthen cybersecurity posture, and enable measurable operational efficiency. Through robust integration strategies, production grade DevOps practices, automation, and advanced observability, we deliver stable digital foundations that support continuous innovation and long term competitive advantage.

jumpstart.title: Accelerate Your Cloud Transformation
jumpstart.description: Whether you're migrating legacy systems, integrating SaaS platforms, or building new cloud native services, our team delivers secure and production ready solutions across AWS, Azure, and hybrid environments.

benefits1.caption: Cloud Integration
benefits1.title: Building Secure & Scalable Cloud Foundations
benefits1.description: We design and implement cloud environments that improve performance, reduce operational risk, and enable long term growth. Our approach combines architecture expertise, security best practices, and automation to deliver reliable, production ready platforms.

fast.title: Faster Deployments

senior.title: Enterprise Grade Security
senior.descr: Secure by design architectures aligned with governance, compliance, and industry standards.

stats.fastLaunch: We design, develop, test, and deploy modern, high performance websites in accelerated timelines without compromising quality. From UX research and UI design to backend development, QA testing, and production launch, our streamlined process ensures your website goes live quickly while meeting enterprise level standards.
stats.pageSpeed: Every website we build follows a performance first architecture. We optimize code structure, image delivery, caching strategies, and Core Web Vitals to ensure fast loading speeds, improved user experience, and stronger SEO rankings. Speed is not an afterthought, it is engineered from day one.
stats.leads: Our websites are built with conversion strategy at their core. We implement clear call-to-actions, optimized landing flows, trust-building design elements, and data-driven UX decisions to transform visitors into qualified leads and measurable business opportunities.
stats.seoMarketing: Beyond development, we provide integrated SEO and digital marketing support. From keyword research and technical SEO optimization to content structuring and analytics tracking, we ensure your website is not just beautiful but discoverable, scalable, and built to support long-term growth.

about.caption: Our Expertise
about.title: We build websites that convert, rank, and scale.

achievements.title: Real results for growing businesses.
achievements.description: From website design and development to SEO strategy and digital marketing execution, we help brands grow with measurable impact.

scalableCode.title: Scalable & Clean Code
scalableCode.description: Our development approach focuses on maintainability and scalability, allowing your website to grow with your business without requiring constant rebuilds.

seoReady.title: SEO-Ready Foundation
seoReady.description: Every website we build includes technical SEO fundamentals, structured data readiness, optimized metadata, and performance enhancements to help you rank from day one.
